title: Luffy Carries the Promise Upward
main_description: Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.
key_events: Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.
